title: Zelda: Breath of the Wild (Wii U) - First 15 Minutes, Spoiler Free
description:
Dislaimer: I pre-ordered the game already, no need to come at me like "But u piraaated iiiit!!!111".
No, I already bought it... For the Switch tho, but that'll only arrive on Friday :)

I already knew some stuff from the game since I played it at a Switch event in Vienna. It runs surprisingly smooth on the Wii U so far, only a few frame drops here and there.
